playbook.intent: Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.
playbook.scope: Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Find the repeated pattern
stage.intent: Pick the one problem you have solved 3+ times.

tasks.task: Audit last 12 months of client work
Pick the most lucrative + repeatable one

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when problem has been solved 3+ times.

stage.name: Productize the offer
stage.intent: Fixed scope, fixed price, fixed timeline.

tasks.task: Lock a fixed delivery window (e.g. 2 weeks)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when offer fits on one page.

stage.name: Delivery system
stage.intent: Build the SOPs that make it repeatable.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when SOP can be executed without your custom thinking.

stage.name: Landing page
stage.intent: A landing built around outcomes, not hours.

tasks.task: Write the landing copy from the customers desired outcome

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when booking flow completes end-to-end.

stage.name: Pre-sell pilots
stage.intent: Land 3 paid pilots before the public push.

tasks.task: Outreach to warm past clients first
Offer pilot pricing with a defined scope

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with 3 paid pilots in the pipeline.

stage.name: Run the pilots

tasks.task: Execute the SOP for each pilot
Get written testimonials at the end

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all 3 pilots complete with positive testimonial.

stage.name: Refine + public launch
stage.intent: Tighten the offer, then go public.

tasks.task: Tighten SOP based on pilot feedback

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when public launch shipped to ICP.

stage.name: Switch billing model
stage.intent: Stop selling hours, start selling outcomes.

tasks.task: Wind down hourly client contracts gracefully
Re-route new inquiries to the productized offer

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when new inquiries default to the productized offer.

stage.name: Lessons + iterate
stage.intent: Update the playbook based on real revenue.

tasks.task: Decide: scale, raise price, or sunset

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when next-move is committed in writing.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content productized-service-launch-4-week-sprint --format md, agent: faion get-content productized-service-launch-4-week-sprint --format context, json: faion get-content productized-service-launch-4-week-sprint --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
